title: Peach Mochi Cakes with Wine Glaze
description: A sweet and refreshing dessert featuring the flavors of Japan, with a hint of peach and a drizzle of wine glaze.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the peach puree, sugar, and water until well combined.
Add the mochi flour to the bowl and stir until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape.
Place the disks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
While the cakes are baking, prepare the wine glaze by whisking together the wine and butter (if using) in a small bowl.
Once the cakes are done, remove them from the oven and let them cool for 5 minutes.
Drizzle the wine glaze over the cakes and serve warm.
